players.name: Caitlin Clark
players.injury_comment: Clark continues to land on the injury report due to a lingering back issue, though she's expected to suit up Saturday. The superstar guard has appeared in each of Indiana's last seven games, averaging 17.4 points, 7.6 assists, 4.6 rebounds and 0.9 steals in 31.3 minutes per contest during that span.

players.name: Sophie Cunningham
players.injury_comment: After sitting out Thursday's contest versus Chicago, Cunningham is expected to keep her absence to a one-game minimum Saturday. Over 11 appearances in 2026, Cunningham has averaged 8.7 points, 2.5 rebounds and 1.7 assists in 22.9 minutes per game.
